title: Setting PATH on UA HPC
author: Bonnie L Hurwitz
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jh8cj9w

steps.title: Open your "
steps.instruction: Open your ".bashrc" in a text editor (nano, vi, emacs): $ cd $HOME $ nano .bashrc

steps.title: Add the following lines
steps.instruction: Add the following lines: export PATH=/rsgrps/bh_class/rakudobrew/bin:/rsgrps/bh_class/bin:$PATH export PYTHONPATH=/rsgrps/bh_class/lib/python

steps.title: Ensure that you environment has the new paths
steps.instruction: Ensure that you environment has the new paths: $ echo $PATH $ echo $PYTHONLIB

steps.title: Try executing the following
steps.instruction: Try executing the following: $ seqmagick -h $ perl6 --version $ python --version
